headline.purpose: Section titles and case-study project names.

mono.purpose: Process indices and browser URL bar.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill CTA — contact, live, primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.75rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #38bdf8; color: #020617; padding: 0 1.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7dd3fc; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #38bdf8; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost pill — details, secondary browse actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.75rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #f4f4f5; padding: 0 1.25rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(56,189,248,0.35); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: #fff; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #38bdf8; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Default panel for services, skills, contact tiles.
components.html:
Service

Short description of the path.
components.css: .ds-surface-card { border-radius: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); background: #0c0c12; padding: 1.5rem; color: #f4f4f5; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 0.5rem; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.025em; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.625; color: #b0b0ba; }

components.name: Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #d4d4d8; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; min-height: 2.75rem; align-items: center; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #a1a1aa; text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms ease, background-color 180ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #f4f4f5; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #38bdf8; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Filter Tab
components.description: Active/inactive project filters on All work.
components.css: .ds-filters { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-filter { display: inline-flex; height: 2.75rem; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); padding: 0 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #a1a1aa; cursor: pointer; } .ds-filter-active { border-color: transparent; background: #38bdf8; color: #000; } .ds-filter:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #38bdf8; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Browser Frame
components.html:
latorin.ir
Preview
components.css: .ds-browser { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: #0a0a0f; box-shadow: 0 8px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 20px 40px -16px rgba(0,0,0,0.75); outline: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-browser-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); padding: 0.625rem 0.875rem; } .ds-dot { width: 0.625rem; height: 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #ff5f57; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-dot:nth-child(2) { background: #febc2e; } .ds-dot:nth-child(3) { background: #28c840; } .ds-url { flex: 1; min-width: 0; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #a1a1aa; text-align: center; } .ds-browser-body { display: flex; min-height: 8rem; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0c0c12; color: #71717a; font-size: 0.875rem; }

narrative.overview: A dark, calm bench for real tools and screenshots — craft without theatrics. Near-black surfaces, one sky-cyan accent, browser-framed product shots as proof. Personality: clear · capable · direct. Rejects generic AI SaaS dark templates.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black base with sky accent used sparingly for CTAs and focus
FA-first RTL default; EN as peer via client toggle
Pill primary/secondary buttons; 14px surface cards with ring, not heavy shadow
Real project screenshots in browser chrome
Practical a11y: focus rings, contrast, 44px touch, reduced-motion

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Sky is for action and focus. Do not introduce a second brand accent for decoration.

rules.name: The No SaaS Purple Rule
rules.body: Do not let purple mesh or violet chrome become the brand. Mesh is atmosphere only.

rules.name: The No Kicker Grammar Rule
rules.body: Do not put tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: surface-card has border + fill, no drop shadow. No ghost-card pattern on ordinary UI.

dos: Do lead with live projects and real screenshots as proof.
Do keep primary CTA as contact (Telegram / email) and secondary as browse work.
Do preserve FA-first RTL defaults and readable muted body on void.
Do keep touch targets ≥ 44px on primary controls.
donts: Don't ship generic AI SaaS dark templates — purple identity glows, hero-metric rows, identical icon cards.
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
Don't use gradient text or side-stripe accent borders.
Don't pair 1px border + wide soft drop shadows on ordinary cards/buttons.
Don't invent a second system accent or replace sky CTAs with project accents.
Don't gate content visibility solely on scroll animations.
